name: CaYaBlockWeb

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src-elem 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src data:; connect-src 'self' https://publicsuffix.org

description: CaYaBlockWeb - Web Protection Extension by CaYaSafeSystem
